content.body:
init: removes profiles/ scaffold dir, profile file seeding, profile-based
runtime config. Extracts buildRuntimeConfig/Constraints/Skills/Identity
helpers. Writes communication.mode from onboarding mode selection.
onboarding: removes profile select group and DefaultProfile field from
OnboardingResult. Adds normal mode option. One fewer form group.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(init,onboarding): remove profile selection, wire communication mode
